parameters.query:
INSERT INTO ct_users (phone, name, registered, terms_at, source)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.phone }}',
  NULLIF('{{ $json.name }}', ''),
  '{{ $json.terms_accepted }}' = 'true',
  CASE WHEN '{{ $json.terms_accepted }}' = 'true' THEN NOW() ELSE NULL END,
  'whatsapp_flow'
)
ON CONFLICT (phone) DO UPDATE SET
  name = CASE WHEN NULLIF('{{ $json.name }}', '') IS NOT NULL THEN '{{ $json.name }}' ELSE ct_users.name END,
  registered = CASE WHEN '{{ $json.terms_accepted }}' = 'true' THEN true ELSE ct_users.registered END,
  terms_at = CASE WHEN '{{ $json.terms_accepted }}' = 'true' AND ct_users.terms_at IS NULL THEN NOW() ELSE ct_users.terms_at END,
  updated_at = NOW()
RETURNING user_id, name, total_goals
